notes: Builds VibeGuard (pre-publish security scanner) and evaluates it on 8 curated synthetic projects with ground-truth annotations under three policies (precision/recall/F1, gate accuracy) — the paper calls this 'controlled experiments' but it is a benchmark-style evaluation on a curated synthetic task set, not human-subject or repo-mining work. Also contributes a five-category vulnerability taxonomy (conceptual/framework).
